items.notes: Version numbers follow Cisco NX-OS X.Y(z) convention; check Cisco official documentation for exact build numbers and end-of-life dates; consider hardware model support.

Versions are for common universal images (e.g., iosxe-*.pkg). 17.12.x is the current train; 17.12.3 is the latest general availability. 17.12.1 is recommended for stability and broad hardware support. 16.12.x releases are EOL; upgrade to 17.12.x. Always verify hardware compatibility and license requirements in the official Cisco Software Center and CCO documentation.

Versions are for Cisco Catalyst 9800 Series Wireless LAN Controllers. Confirm compatibility with your specific model and feature set. Refer to official Cisco documentation for detailed end-of-life dates and migration guidance.
Versions are examples based on typical release patterns; verify exact build numbers and end-of-life dates on the official Palo Alto Networks support and lifecycle pages as of today.
